decision.summary: Keep the unresolved April 15 73k dip position unchanged and do not open any new price-hit or floor trade.
decision.rationale: The latest transcript and summaries still keep the bigger Beecthor thesis bearish, but the newest short-term read is mixed: he allows one more corrective push higher toward 78k-79k and explicitly prefers not to chase, ideally after a pullback toward 73.2k-72.4k first. Binance at 75001.4 is near the 24h high and does not confirm a fresh bearish breakdown, so bearish price-hit entries are not aligned with execution reality, while the nearest bullish daily line above spot is 76k at only 37.5%, below the preferred band and too chasey. The open April 15 73k dip Yes is effectively worthless at 0.0 and not a take-profit case, with stop-loss still disabled in the early-stage portfolio, and the floor market above 74k at 70.5% is invalid because Beecthor still allows BTC to trade back below 74k.
